expectations.text: The completed artifact contains a Scenario Traceability row for S1 and S2.
expectations.evidence: The baseline artifact contains rows for S1 and S2 in Scenario Traceability.

expectations.text: The manual verification log identifies S2 and records the observed walkthrough.
expectations.evidence: The baseline log records a device observation but never identifies S2.

expectations.text: The completed artifact has status done only after its completion evidence is complete.
expectations.evidence: The new completion lint rejects the baseline artifact because the S2 manual walkthrough is not identifiable in Verification Log.

uncertainties: The evaluation runner did not expose per-run token or duration metrics.
